overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a drive through Los Santos. The player follows a dump truck on an elevated highway before exiting onto commercial streets, stopping at intersections, and navigating through traffic on palm-lined boulevards. The sunny weather and detailed urban environment showcase the game's graphics.

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway with concrete barriers, following a dump truck through a downtown canyon of modern glass office towers. Green highway signage is visible overhead as the truck ahead slows to exit.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the highway onto surface streets, the vehicle turns right onto a commercial boulevard. The distinctive Los Santos building with its domed tower appears on the left while retail stores line the right. The scene transitions from the enclosed highway to open city streets with scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a red light at a wide urban intersection, the camera watches as a white sports car and blue bus pass through. The Los Santos building remains visible on the left while traffic signals and crosswalk markings define the intersection space.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the green light onto a palm-lined commercial boulevard, the vehicle follows a green garbage truck while navigating around other traffic. Art deco buildings and distant mountains frame the scene as the drive continues through the sunny urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from an enclosed elevated highway into the open, sun-drenched commercial boulevards of the city. It begins by following a dump truck through a downtown canyon of modern glass office towers and concrete barriers, passing under green highway signage. As the truck slows to exit, the camera turns right onto a surface street, shifting from the highway's confinement to an open urban landscape featuring retail stores and a prominent domed tower. The movement then pauses at a wide intersection with visible crosswalks and traffic signals, watching a white sports car and blue bus pass by before the light changes. Finally, the vehicle accelerates onto a palm-lined boulevard, following a green garbage truck past art deco buildings toward distant mountains under a clear, sunny sky.
